message:
feat(python): numpy.fft.rfftn wrapper parity (franken_numpy-rzeu)

Adds a passthrough wrapper for numpy.fft.rfftn covering the optional
shape tuple `s`, axes selection (default: all axes), norm conventions
('backward'/'ortho'/'forward'), and `out=` destination. Test covers
3-D real default transform with verified n//2+1 last-axis output
shape, s=(4,4,8) zero-pad, axes=(-1,-2) subset, norm=ortho/forward,
complex dtype parity, and irfftn round-trip identity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
